evals.prompt: This function has a cyclomatic complexity of 14. Break it up.
evals.expected_output: Claude should scope the refactor (ask what function/file, map callers), check test coverage before touching anything, plan atomic increments, and not immediately start rewriting code.

evals.prompt: I've got trigger parsing logic duplicated in 3 different files. Centralize it into a shared helper.
evals.expected_output: Claude should map all 3 file locations, check what calls each duplicate, verify tests cover the behavior, then extract incrementally — not just paste into a new file.

evals.prompt: Migrate the side panel component to a tab — same data, different layout.
evals.expected_output: Claude should flag that this may be a feature change (not pure refactor) if behavior changes, scope the blast radius, and establish a green baseline before restructuring.
